film.title: Ransom
film.overview: When a rich man's son is kidnapped, he cooperates with the police at first but then tries a unique tactic against the criminals.

dialogues.dialogue: - Yeah. - Mullen, you're a fool!  Stupid a*s!  I'm proud of you!  A pair of armed bandits held 'em up last night.  Police say a pair of gun-toting crooks went into the Korean church at Murray Street... in Flushing last night and announced a robbery.
Yeah. Well, I'm surprised to see you up and about so quick.  - Uh, uh, Fatima, this is, uh, Jimmy Shaker. - Hi.  I'm very proud to meet you.  - Very proud. - Thanks.  How's the, uh, kid doin'?
- Uh, uh, Fatima, this is, uh, Jimmy Shaker. - Hi.  I'm very proud to meet you.  - Very proud. - Thanks.  How's the, uh, kid doin'?  Oh, he's fine, you know, all things considered.

- Nice to meet you. - Yeah? You too.  - How you doin', Mr Mullen? Good to meet you. - Hey.  Just wanna shake your hand, boss. You made us proud.  - Well, you know, just doin' the job. - Yeah.  What do you think of this guy, Mr Mullen?
